tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "ALLOW_WAN"
set subnet 7.0.14.0 255.255.255.0
next
edit "ALLOW_LAN"
set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "EGRESS_ALLOWLIST"
set member "ALLOW_WAN" "ALLOW_LAN"
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "LAN_to_WAN_Allowlist"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
set dstaddr "ALLOW_WAN"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "PING"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "LAN_to_LAN_Allow"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port2"
set action accept
set srcaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
set dstaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "LAN_to_WAN_Allowlist"
        set uuid 11ab8ea0-2948-51f1-b22b-8a262b3e6243
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
        set dstaddr "ALLOW_WAN"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "PING"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "LAN_to_LAN_Allow"
        set uuid 11bfb060-2948-51f1-3e53-0165d5bad7d3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
        set dstaddr "ALLOW_LAN"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
